name: Find Familiar
components: M (burning incense worth 10+ GP, which the spell consumes)
description: You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose: Bat, Cat, Frog, Hawk, Lizard, Octopus, Owl, Rat, Raven, Spider, Weasel, or another Beast that has a Challenge Rating of 0. The familiar acts independently but obeys your commands. While within 100 feet, you can communicate telepathically and use a Bonus Action to see through its eyes. When you cast a touch spell, the familiar can deliver it. The familiar can't attack but can take other actions. If it drops to 0 HP, it disappears and reappears when you cast this spell again.
